skills.description: Create, edit, inspect, and validate PowerPoint .pptx decks, including native equations, embedded videos, animations, PowerPoint PDF QA, existing-deck ingestion, and safe human-agent round-trip workflows.

dependencies.name: python
dependencies.notes: Python scripts use uv inline metadata where available.

dependencies.name: uv
dependencies.notes: Used to run bundled Python scripts without project-local dependency setup.

dependencies.name: bun
dependencies.notes: Optional until native equation conversion is needed; do not run bun install without consent.

dependencies.name: Microsoft PowerPoint for Mac
dependencies.notes: Needed only for macOS high-fidelity visual QA PDF export.

dependencies.name: ffmpeg and ffprobe
dependencies.notes: Needed for video normalization, codec verification, duration checks, and last-frame extraction.

dependencies.name: LibreOffice
dependencies.notes: Approximate rendering fallback on macOS, Linux, and Windows; never use it to re-save a deck.

network_access.purpose: download release archive or raw files

writes: selected target agent skill directory from supported_agents.target_paths
manual_steps: Choose exactly one target agent before making changes.
Detect whether the environment is macOS, Linux, native Windows, or WSL before choosing paths.
Review the dry-run plan and explicitly say proceed.
Approve optional runtime setup such as bun install only when a later task needs it.
verification: Confirm the target skill directory exists and contains SKILL.md.
Run the target agent's normal skill discovery or list command when available.
Optionally run python skill validation if a local validator is available.
rollback: Remove the installed target skill directory if it was created by this installer.
Restore any timestamped backup if a managed target was replaced.
Remove the corresponding install-state entry under `~/.agent-tools/state/` or `%USERPROFILE%\.agent-tools\state\` if present.
